instruction: Help me enter the equipment maintenance information into the ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Equipment Maintenance Record
Equipment ID: EQP-CNC-005
Equipment Name: 5-Axis CNC Machining Center
Failure Time: 2025-03-13 09:15
Failure Description: Z-axis ball screw wear, precision degradation
Repair Technician: Outsourced Engineer Tian Hao
Repair Content: Replace Z-axis ball screw and bearings
Parts Cost: 8600 CNY
Labor Cost: 1500 CNY
Repair Completion: 2025-03-13 17:30
Downtime: 8.25 hours' > /home/user/Desktop/maintenance_log.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Equipment ID'; ws['B1'] = 'Equipment Name'; ws['C1'] = 'Failure Description'; ws['D1'] = 'Repair Tech'; ws['E1'] = 'Parts Cost(CNY)'; ws['F1'] = 'Labor Cost(CNY)'; ws['G1'] = 'Downtime(h)'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/maintenance_record.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me enter the equipment maintenance information into the ledger

Fill the maintenance information from /home/user/Desktop/maintenance_log.txt into /home/user/Desktop/maintenance_record.xlsx row 2: A2='EQP-CNC-005', B2='5-Axis CNC Machining Center', C2='Z-axis ball screw wear', D2='Tian Hao', E2=8600, F2=1500, G2=8.25, save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/maintenance_record.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'EQP-CNC-005' in s else 'FAILED')"
